comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Completed Phase 2/3 extraction slice for Ralph. Added src/ralph/repo.ts and src/services/ralph.ts, moved sync fs persistence out of src/ralph/index.ts into a FileSystem-backed repo service, and moved the Ralph loop/controller logic into an Effect-native service using Ref + Deferred coordination instead of module-global current-loop / Promise handshake state. Kept ctx.newSession() and ctx.switchSession() command-owned via a narrow boundary adapter in src/ralph/index.ts. Added test/ralph-repo.test.ts and test/ralph-core-service.test.ts, kept the existing Ralph freeze suites passing, and verified with targeted Ralph tests plus `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`. Review loop result: spec PASS, quality APPROVED.
